content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip!
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! You've been super helpful.
Thank you so much for everything — I really appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢并回应了祝福
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'helpful' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me find the right gate.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我找到正确的登机口。
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful flight!
It was my pleasure — enjoy your trip!
No problem at all! Safe travels!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应感谢并主动祝福
语言准确性：是否使用正确句型（如 It was my pleasure / You're welcome）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、不生硬，符合服务场景
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'welcome', 'pleasure', 'enjoy', 'safe travels' 等道别关键词

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you staying late to help me with my booking.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你留下来帮我完成预订。
expectedAnswers: I'm glad I could help! Thanks for your kindness!
It was no trouble at all — have a fantastic trip!
Thank you for saying that! I'm happy to assist anytime.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了深层感谢并传递积极情绪
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的高级表达（如 glad I could help, no trouble at all）
表达自然度：是否避免机械回应，体现情感温度
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'appreciate', 'glad', 'no trouble', 'happy to assist' 等情感词汇
